SQLLite.SQL: SELECT UC.USER_ID AS "UserId" , UC.DATE_FROM AS "DateFrom" , UC.DATE_TO AS "DateTo" , UC.HOME_FLAG AS "HomeFlag" , UC.COURT_CODE AS "CourtCode" , UC.SECTION_NAME AS "SectionName" FROM USER_COURT UC WHERE UC.USER_ID = ${param.userId} AND UC.HOME_FLAG = 'Y' AND ( trunc(NVL(UC.DATE_FROM,SYSDATE)) < trunc(SYSDATE) OR trunc(NVL(UC.DATE_FROM, SYSDATE)) = trunc(SYSDATE) ) AND ( trunc(NVL(UC.DATE_TO,SYSDATE)) > trunc(SYSDATE) OR trunc(NVL(UC.DATE_TO,SYSDATE)) = trunc(SYSDATE) )

Security.roles: viewOnly medium high wcSuper scSuper bmsSuper aeSuper dmSuper
